tasks.subject: Task 0: Install dependencies and wire global CSS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add KaTeX and friends to the client package, import the KaTeX stylesheet, and add the small CSS overrides.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/client/package.json
- Modify: apps/client/src/main.tsx
- Modify: apps/client/src/global.css

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- katex, remark-math, rehype-katex in dependencies; @types/katex in devDependencies
- main.tsx imports katex/dist/katex.min.css after ./global.css
- global.css has .katex, .math-block, .katex-display overrides
- typecheck + build pass

**Verify:** `pnpm -C apps/client typecheck && pnpm -C apps/client build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/package.json", "apps/client/src/main.tsx", "apps/client/src/global.css"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm -C apps/client typecheck && pnpm -C apps/client build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["deps installed", "KaTeX CSS imported globally", "CSS overrides appended", "typecheck passes", "build succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Implement renderMathInHtml with unit tests (TDD)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure function `renderMathInHtml(html)` that walks the DOM, skips code/pre/a/script/style and mention subtrees, and replaces math delimiters with KaTeX-rendered HTML.

**Files:**
- Create: apps/client/src/lib/math.ts
- Create: apps/client/src/lib/math.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Fast path for no `$`
- Inline `$…$` and block `$$…$$` rendered with correct KaTeX options
- Skipped subtrees: code, pre, a, script, style, [data-mention-user-id]
- All bad/boundary cases from spec produce plain text
- Invalid LaTeX returns .katex-error span; no throw
- 100% line+branch coverage on math.ts

**Verify:** `pnpm -C apps/client test src/lib/math.test.ts` + `pnpm -C apps/client test:cov -- src/lib/math.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/lib/math.ts", "apps/client/src/lib/math.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm -C apps/client test src/lib/math.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fast path", "inline + block rendering", "skipped subtrees", "bad/boundary cases", "error path", "100% coverage"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Wire remark-math + rehype-katex into Markdown path
tasks.description:
**Goal:** MarkdownMessageContent renders LaTeX via remark-math + rehype-katex with shared KaTeX options.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/client/src/components/channel/MessageContent.tsx (Markdown path)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ReactMarkdown has remarkMath in remarkPlugins and rehypeKatex in rehypePlugins with { throwOnError: false, strict: 'ignore', output: 'htmlAndMathml', trust: false }
- Existing Markdown-path tests still pass

**Verify:** `pnpm -C apps/client test src/components/channel/__tests__`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/components/channel/MessageContent.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm -C apps/client test src/components/channel/__tests__", "acceptanceCriteria": ["plugins wired correctly", "no regressions"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Wire renderMathInHtml into HTML (Lexical) path
tasks.description:
**Goal:** HtmlMessageContent runs renderMathInHtml between code-block highlighting and linkifyHtml.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/client/src/components/channel/MessageContent.tsx (HTML path)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- processedContent pipeline order: mentions → code-blocks → renderMathInHtml → linkifyHtml
- Existing HTML-path tests still pass

**Verify:** `pnpm -C apps/client test src/components/channel/__tests__`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/components/channel/MessageContent.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm -C apps/client test src/components/channel/__tests__", "acceptanceCriteria": ["math rendering inserted in pipeline", "order is correct", "no regressions"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Integration tests across both render paths
tasks.description:
**Goal:** End-to-end coverage exercising MessageContent (Markdown + HTML) with math alongside code blocks and mentions.

**Files:**
- Create: apps/client/src/components/channel/__tests__/message-math.integration.test.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Markdown message with `$\sum k$` renders .katex
- Lexical HTML with inline + block math renders both (.katex and .katex-display)
- Combined code + mention + math renders each correctly
- Screenshot-style content renders without error

**Verify:** `pnpm -C apps/client test src/components/channel/__tests__/message-math.integration.test.tsx`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/components/channel/__tests__/message-math.integration.test.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm -C apps/client test src/components/channel/__tests__/message-math.integration.test.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["markdown path", "html path inline + block", "combined code/mention/math", "screenshot content"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Final verification (tests, coverage, lint, typecheck, build, manual)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm no regressions and sanity-check the feature in the browser.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Full client test suite green
- Lint clean
- Typecheck clean
- Build succeeds
- math.ts at 100% coverage
- Manual browser check: screenshot content renders, copy-paste yields LaTeX source, `$5 vs $10` stays plain text, `$PATH` in fenced code stays plain text

**Verify:** `pnpm -C apps/client test && pnpm -C apps/client test:cov && pnpm -C apps/client lint:ci && pnpm -C apps/client typecheck && pnpm -C apps/client build`

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "pnpm -C apps/client test && pnpm -C apps/client lint:ci && pnpm -C apps/client typecheck && pnpm -C apps/client build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["full tests pass", "coverage 100% on math.ts", "lint clean", "typecheck clean", "build succeeds", "manual verification passes"]}
```
